content.query:
-- CREATE VIEW CALENDAR
----------------------------
CREATE VIEW gold.calendar
AS 
SELECT
* 
FROM 
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://awprojectstorage.blob.core.windows.net/silver/Calendar/',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) as QUER1
GO

----------------------------

        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
